response: The function implements the classic 0/1 Knapsack dynamic-programming algorithm: it fills a (n + 1) × (capacity + 1) table where dp[i][w] stores the maximum total value obtainable using the first i items with weight limit w. By iteratively choosing, for each item, the better of “exclude it” (dp[i-1][w]) or “include it” (dp[i-1][w-weight] + value), the routine ultimately returns the highest value achievable within the given capacity.
